zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Webb於大約1527年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Sir William Webb18歲，母親Grace Arden15歲。她於1545年與John Hill在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年12月在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Webb于大约1527年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Sir William Webb18岁，母亲Grace Arden15岁。她于1545年与John Hill在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1580年12月在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

variants.name: Webster
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webber
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Webb was born about 1527, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Webb, was 18 and her mother, Grace Arden, was 15. She married John Hill in 1545, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in December 1580, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Webbが約1527年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Webbは18歳，母Grace Ardenは15歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンでJohn Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1580年12月に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Webb(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Webb(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Arden(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 John Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 12월 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Webb родилась около 1527 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Webb было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Arden, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hill в 1545 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1580 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
